title: PROCEDURE FOR ISSUING LICENSES TO SMALL BUSINESS AND ENTREPRENEURSHIP ENTITIES
author: Muqaddas Shirinova, Shoxruzbek Begiyev
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This scientific article analyzes the legal basis, practical mechanisms, and economic significance of the procedure for issuing licenses to small businesses and entrepreneurs. The stages of the licensing process, the role of authorized bodies, the procedure for submitting and considering applications, as well as the impact of digitization processes are covered. The study considers current issues of improving the licensing system based on the current regulatory legal acts of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
steps_raw: This scientific article analyzes the legal basis, practical mechanisms, and economic significance of the procedure for issuing licenses to small businesses and entrepreneurs. The stages of the licensing process, the role of authorized bodies, the procedure for submitting and considering applications, as well as the impact of digitization processes are covered. The study considers current issues of improving the licensing system based on the current regulatory legal acts of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
keywords: small business, entrepreneurship, license, licensing procedure, permitting process, state control, electronic government, business entity, regulatory legal acts.
